2026 is the first year that the Magic Millions Gold Coast March Yearling Sale has been open to non-QTIS horses, and there are several vendors taking advantage of another chance to sell their stock at the Gold Coast.

The latest entrant to the Inglis Chairman's Sale was confirmed on Tuesday morning, when it was announced that last start winner of the G2 Challenge Stakes, Generosity, would be offered at the sale in May.

It was a morning of headturners at Rosehill Gardens on Tuesday, where Victorian G1 Golden Slipper Stakes raider Closer To Free easily accounted for his Sydney opposition and Briasa left his trial field in the dust. Plus, a pair of Russian Revolution juvenile fillies impress.

Ahead of the 2026 Magic Millions Gold Coast March Yearling Sale, we have identified three yearlings whose pedigrees have received black-type or metropolitan updates over the past couple of months, potentially increasing their value and certainly enhancing their profile.

Once a proven stallion’s reputation is set in the market, it’s difficult to change. For Toronado, his ability to leave top horses in Hong Kong has cemented him as a sire of colts and geldings. On Saturday, his filly Grinzinger Heart won the G2 Sires’ Produce Stakes, but she’s not an exception to the rule for her sire.

Adelaide Cup Day at Morphettville produced a memorable afternoon of stakes racing, headlined by a dramatic G2 Adelaide Cup victory for American Wolf, while Jamie Melham starred in the saddle with a treble including Listed wins aboard Celerity and Arran Bay.

Andrea Atzeni delivered a standout performance at Sha Tin with four winners on the card, while Fast Network seized his opportunity in the feature race. Meanwhile, Tony Cruz’s stable also impressed with a treble highlighted by Stunning Peach.

Michael Freedman trained the Canberra Guineas winner Aerodrome and the National Sprint trifecta compiled of three different Freedman partnerships. Canberra trained Music Time kept the G3 Black Opal at home while international sire sensation Frankel won two stakes races on the card.
